groups.instruction: Answer the questions based on the audio.
groups.prompt_html:
MULTIPLE CHOICE 75

Questions 21 - 25

Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

Magna Carta

21 Jess and Simon agree that King John was disliked because he

A was blamed for the loss of territory.
B was planning to start a war against France.
C lacked the communication skills that were expected of a monarch.

22 According to Jess, the main purpose of Magna Carta was to

A enable England to win a war.
B resolve a conflict involving the king.
C improve the lives of ordinary people.

23 What does Simon say he learned from the lecture?

A who benefited most from Magna Carta
B how significant Magna Carta has been in other countries
C what made King John agree to the wording of Magna Carta

24 Jess feels that the fact that Magna Carta was regularly updated indicates that

A it had been poorly written and needed to be made clearer.
B it enabled subsequent kings to be seen as great lawmakers.
C it was seen as an effective means of limiting the king’s power.

25 Simon mentions other English kings in order to

A list people who were critical of John’s achievements.
B explain why these monarchs were more successful than John.
C argue that rebellions like the ones John faced were common in those times.
